design_philosophy: Objective, rigid, and functional. A 'Control Room' for data engineers. Pure structural grayscale with color used exclusively for functional state (approve/reject/score). No generic SaaS shadows. Heavy reliance on visible grid lines and stark typography.

typography.rules: Never center-align data or headings unless it's an explicit numeric metric block. Use tracking-tight for all headings.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B). Dense, functional, scanning-optimized.
spacing_and_layout.layout_structure: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-0 border-collapse. Everything fits tightly like a terminal window.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Sharp edges (rounded-none). Containers use border-r and border-b to create a contiguous grid. No drop shadows.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding for breathing room despite dense borders (p-6 to p-8 inside panels).

buttons.style: rounded-none border border-black px-6 py-2 text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-colors

cards.style: border border-border bg-white rounded-none shadow-none p-6 flex flex-col gap-4

code_viewer.style: font-mono text-sm bg-gray-50 border border-border p-6 overflow-x-auto selection:bg-black selection:text-white

badges.style: rounded-none border border-black px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase

interactions_and_motion.hover: Instant or very fast transitions (duration-150). No bouncy physics. Hover states should invert colors or sharply darken backgrounds.
interactions_and_motion.focus: High contrast focus rings. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:ring-offset-2 focus:outline-none.
interactions_and_motion.active: Press states should use scale-y-95 or translate-y-px.

accessibility.contrast: APCA-compliant. Black on white, or stark brand colors on white.
accessibility.testing_attributes: MANDATORY: Use data-testid on every interactive element. Kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='select-task-easy', data-testid='btn-approve').

icons.style: Use 'regular' or 'bold' weight to match the stark typography. Avoid rounded icon variants.

media_and_assets.notes: No placeholder images. This is a technical IDE-like dashboard, pure data and text.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize React with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI (using purely .js/.jsx, NO TypeScript).
2. Install required fonts (Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono) via Google Fonts in index.css.
4. Strip all Shadcn components of rounded corners (replace rounded-md/lg with rounded-none). Remove all box-shadows.
5. Build a dense, IDE-like layout using CSS Grid where panels are delineated purely by 1px solid borders (no gaps).
6. Ensure all state changes (Approve, Reject) reflect immediately in the 'Session History' and 'Reward/Score' blocks.
7. Implement syntax highlighting for the SQL Query Viewer (e.g., using prismjs or react-syntax-highlighter).
8. MANDATORY: Attach data-testid to every button, form input, and key statistic display.
9. Keep color to an absolute minimum. Use color ONLY to signify status (Green = Approve, Red = Reject/Error). Backgrounds must remain stark white or light gray.
